description_long: This armchair features a geometric, boxy design with straight lines and sharp angles, giving it a modern and minimalist appearance. The exterior is finished in a light, marble-like texture, while the seat and backrest surfaces are upholstered in a contrasting muted red color. The armrests are wide, flat, and integrated into the main structure, providing ample support on both sides. The backrest is tall and straight, offering full back support, and the seat is deep and spacious. The legs are short and blocky, forming part of the continuous frame, which gives the chair a sturdy and grounded look. There are no visible cushions or decorative elements, emphasizing a clean and functional aesthetic.
description: A modern, boxy armchair with a light marble-textured frame and muted red seat and backrest surfaces, featuring wide integrated armrests and a tall, straight back.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flat armrests, deep red seat and backrest, and the overall boxy structure.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thickness of the armrests and the tall, straight backrest, with the red upholstery visible on the seat and back.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid, uninterrupted light-textured back panel, with no visible upholstery or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the armrest's width and the depth of the seat.
attribute_backrest_style: tall, straight, rectangular, red upholstered panel
